base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of various_enemies — a character from 1990 super mario world. Misc enemies not in other atlases — Monty Mole/Buzzy Beetle/etc.. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Misc enemies not in other atlases — Monty Mole/Buzzy Beetle/etc.
